final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial-style tactical gear showcase with firearms, body armor, and night-vision equipment (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a hardcore military tactical aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be an organized display layout with various firearms, ballistic vests, and night-vision devices arranged neatly
Subject: must include various firearms, ballistic vests, and night-vision equipment
Scene/backdrop: must be a dark background
Lighting/mood: needs a cold, stern lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dark, cold-toned direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
